timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

description: The execution of Han Xin removed a powerful early Han military leader and potential rival.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

description: The death of Gaozu opened a period of regency and court struggle under the early Han.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Empress Lü dominates court
description: Empress Lü consolidated power during the minority of young emperors.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Empress Lü dies
description: The Lü clan was overthrown and imperial authority was restored to the Liu family.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Emperor Wen begins reign
description: Emperor Wen's accession began a period associated with fiscal restraint and internal stability.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

description: The new reign continued consolidation of the dynasty and tensions with regional kings.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Emperor Wu begins reign
description: Emperor Wu launched an expansive and transformative reign in Han history.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Zhang Qian sent west
description: The court dispatched Zhang Qian on a mission that later informed Silk Road diplomacy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: War with the Xiongnu intensifies
description: The Han state adopted more aggressive frontier operations against the Xiongnu confederation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

description: The court introduced a major calendar reform under Emperor Wu.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Witchcraft crisis erupts
description: A destructive court crisis damaged the position of the crown prince and senior officials.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Emperor Wu dies
description: The death of Emperor Wu ended one of the most consequential reigns of the dynasty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Protectorate of the Western Regions established
description: The Han court formalized administration over parts of the Tarim Basin.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

description: Her marriage alliance became a famous symbol of frontier diplomacy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Wang Mang seizes the throne
description: Wang Mang ended Western Han rule and proclaimed the Xin dynasty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

description: Han power revived in Central Asia under the leadership of Ban Chao.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Cai Lun associated with papermaking improvement
description: Court tradition links Cai Lun with important improvements in paper production.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.

description: Chinese sources reported an embassy from the Roman Empire during Eastern Han.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Yellow Turban Rebellion begins
description: A massive rebellion exposed the weakening authority of the Eastern Han state.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Dong Zhuo seizes the court
description: Military strongman Dong Zhuo dominated the emperor and destabilized the dynasty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Battle of Guandu
description: Cao Cao defeated Yuan Shao in a turning point of late Han civil war.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Battle of Red Cliffs

timeline_title: Timeline of the Han Dynasty
timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones of the Han Dynasty.
title: Han dynasty ends
description: Cao Pi forced the last Han emperor to abdicate, bringing the dynasty to a close.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
timeline_description: Major military and diplomatic milestones of the global Seven Years' War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
timeline_description: Major military and diplomatic milestones of the global Seven Years' War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
timeline_description: Major military and diplomatic milestones of the global Seven Years' War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
timeline_description: Major military and diplomatic milestones of the global Seven Years' War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
timeline_description: Major military and diplomatic milestones of the global Seven Years' War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
timeline_description: Major military and diplomatic milestones of the global Seven Years' War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
timeline_description: Major military and diplomatic milestones of the global Seven Years' War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
timeline_description: Major military and diplomatic milestones of the global Seven Years' War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
timeline_description: Major military and diplomatic milestones of the global Seven Years' War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
timeline_description: Major military and diplomatic milestones of the global Seven Years' War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War

timeline_title: Timeline of the Seven Years' War
